rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Identifies and empirically evaluates 14 cybersecurity risk vectors in AI code.
rationale.org-governance: Proposes an ANN-ISM framework to assess org risk and practice maturity.
rationale.quality-debt: Analyzes non-security quality decay and logic errors in generated code.
rationale.automation-bias: Examines developer over-reliance and skip of due diligence on AI code.
rationale.metrics: Defines risk scoring and maturity metrics for security in code generation.
